items.name_cn:
【Elephant Pink❤ Medium】
Dior book tote shopping bag
Inspired by Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote bag is a flagship piece that embodies Dior aesthetics. It can hold various daily essentials, featuring a fresh interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes embroidery for a more stylish look. The front is adorned with the "Christian Dior" logo, fully reflecting Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Style No.: 1286
Size: 36×28 cm
